notes: Repairs Streamlit Light/Dark/System handling by mapping clicks to the visible appearance controls, including icon clicks where the target text is empty.
Applies the matching seasonal light or dark variant immediately after the user chooses System, Light or Dark.
Avoids continuous polling and broad app-body mutation observation to reduce runtime/reboot risk.
Keeps seasonal Pathmark themes as Summer, Autumn, Winter and Spring, with appearance controlled by Streamlit Light/Dark/System.
release: v0.6.40 Streamlit appearance menu click repair
release_notes: Repairs Pathmark light/dark switching by detecting clicks on Streamlit's visible appearance controls, including icon clicks, and applying the correct seasonal variant without polling.
label: Streamlit appearance menu click repair
